_note: Ground truth for the figure-retrieval acceptance test (attending-authored). For each case: the figures a good board WOULD want, and figure types that are OFF-TARGET. A blind image-verifying judge grades the figures the pipeline attaches. Targets: domain correctness >= 8.5, specific relevance >= 8 (0-10).

cases.query: Left retrosigmoid craniotomy for resection of a 2.5 cm left cerebellopontine angle vestibular schwannoma, hearing-preservation attempt
figures_wanted: CPA axial showing CN VII/VIII complex and the AICA loop, tumor displacing the facial nerve
Internal acoustic canal anatomy: porus, transverse (falciform) crest, Bill's bar
CN V (trigeminal) and superior petrosal vein at the superior CPA / tentorial edge
Lower cranial nerves IX/X/XI at the caudal pole / pontomedullary junction
Suboccipital/retrosigmoid landmarks: asterion, transverse-sigmoid junction, mastoid emissary vein
off_target: Anterior-circulation aneurysm / circle of Willis anatomy

cases.query: Right pterional craniotomy for microsurgical clipping of a ruptured 7 mm right MCA bifurcation (M1) saccular aneurysm, Hunt-Hess 3, SAH
figures_wanted: Sylvian fissure dissection showing M1, the MCA bifurcation, and the M2 trunks
Lenticulostriate perforators arising from M1 (to preserve)
Proximal control anatomy: ICA bifurcation, A1, M1, recurrent artery of Heubner
Aneurysm neck relationship to the parent M1 and early M2 branches
Pterional craniotomy / sphenoid-wing landmarks of the trans-sylvian corridor
off_target: Vertebral artery V3 / craniovertebral junction anatomy
Spinal canal, cauda equina, or pedicle-screw figures

cases.query: Posterior C1 lateral mass and C2 pars/pedicle screw fixation (Goel-Harms) for atlantoaxial instability from a type II odontoid nonunion
figures_wanted: C1 posterior arch and lateral mass with the vertebral-artery groove (sulcus arteriosus)
C2 pars/pedicle anatomy and trajectory relative to the transverse foramen
V3 vertebral artery and the C1-C2 loop, including the high-riding/medialized variant
C2 nerve root / DRG and the C1-C2 joint venous plexus
Screw entry points and trajectories (C1 lateral mass, C2 pedicle, Goel-Harms construct)
